fields.name: Mind Care
fields.description: Grounding and mental reset activities

fields.name: Body Reset
fields.description: Physical regulation and movement

fields.name: Productivity Boost
fields.description: Small wins to regain momentum

fields.title: Sit in sunlight for 5 minutes
fields.description: Step outside or sit near a window and let natural light reach you.

fields.title: Write one thing you're grateful for
fields.description: It can be small. Just one thing.

fields.title: Take a warm shower
fields.description: Reset your body and refresh your senses.

fields.title: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding exercise
fields.description: Name 5 things you see, 4 you feel, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.

fields.title: Take 10 slow breaths
fields.description: Inhale 4 seconds, exhale 6 seconds.

fields.title: Short 10-minute walk
fields.description: Walk without your phone and observe surroundings.

fields.title: Listen to calming music
fields.description: Play something soft and slow for 10 minutes.

fields.title: Light stretching
fields.description: Gently stretch your body to maintain balance.

fields.title: Organize a small space
fields.description: Clean or arrange one small area.

fields.title: Write 3 goals for today
fields.description: Keep them realistic and achievable.

fields.title: Start your hardest task first
fields.description: Use your energy wisely.

fields.title: Quick workout burst
fields.description: Do 20 pushups or 30 squats.

fields.title: Box breathing
fields.description: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4.

fields.title: Write your worries down
fields.description: Putting thoughts on paper reduces mental load.

fields.title: Slow mindful walk
fields.description: Walk slowly and notice each step.

fields.title: Read 5 pages of a book
fields.description: Something light and enjoyable.

fields.title: Tidy your workspace
fields.description: Clear physical clutter to clear mental clutter.

fields.title: Drink a full glass of water
fields.description: Hydration improves clarity.

fields.title: Step away for 5 minutes
fields.description: Remove yourself from the triggering environment.

fields.title: Progressive muscle relaxation
fields.description: Tense and release each muscle group slowly.

fields.title: Write what is bothering you
fields.description: Identify the root of frustration.
